permissionDefinition.code: Unique key used by route and page guards. Prefer stable snake_case or dot naming.
permissionDefinition.name: Display name shown to admins when managing permissions.
permissionDefinition.description: Optional internal explanation for this permission.
permissionDefinition.isActive: Inactive permissions are not considered when calculating user access.
permissionDefinition.save: Changes affect role and group authorization flows.

permissionGroup.name: Group name for identification when assigning to users.
permissionGroup.isSystemAdmin: Members of this group can access all pages and actions without individual permission checks.
permissionGroup.isActive: Inactive groups should not be assigned for new access decisions.
permissionGroup.permissions: Selected permissions define what members of this group can access.
permissionGroup.save: Updates effective access for all users assigned to this group.

userAssignment.user: Choose the user whose access scope you want to manage.
userAssignment.groups: User receives combined permissions from all selected groups.
userAssignment.save: Assignments apply immediately for the next authorization checks. Users may need to refresh their session.
userAssignment.systemAdminNote: If the user has a system-admin group, detailed permissions are bypassed.

wmsScopePolicy.code: Policy code is the stable key used by backend enforcement and support flows.
wmsScopePolicy.name: Operational display name that explains why the policy exists.
wmsScopePolicy.entityType: Determines which document or workflow type this policy applies to.
wmsScopePolicy.scopeType: Defines whether access is unrestricted, branch-based, warehouse-based, or assigned-only.
wmsScopePolicy.description: Optional internal note used for support and audit context.

permissionDefinitions.title: Permission Definitions
permissionDefinitions.description: Manage permission codes used in the system

form.affectedRoutesNone: No matching routes found for this code
form.name: Name
form.webHelp: This permission can be granted for web flows.
form.mobileHelp: This permission can be granted for mobile flows.

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

permissionGroups.title: Permission Groups
permissionGroups.description: Manage permission groups and their assignments

permissionsPanel.title: Edit Group Permissions
permissionsPanel.introBody: Below, you choose which modules this group can view, create, update, or delete. Every user assigned to this group receives the same permission set.
permissionsPanel.selectionSummaryBody: This summary helps you quickly see which operation types are currently granted to the group.
permissionsPanel.searchPlaceholder: Search by module, action, or permission name...

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

permissionGroups.systemAdminLocked: System Admin group cannot be modified

view.description: Opens list, detail, and read-only monitoring screens.

create.description: Opens new record creation and first-save steps.

update.description: Opens edit, process, and change-saving steps for existing records.

delete.description: Allows soft delete, deactivation, or delete actions.

userGroupAssignments.title: User Group Assignments
userGroupAssignments.selectUserHint: Select a user to manage their permission group assignments

wmsScopePolicies.title: WMS Scope Policies
wmsScopePolicies.description: Manage branch, warehouse, and assignment-based data scope rules

form.editDescription: Update the policy behavior and scope type.
form.name: Name
form.includeSelfHint: Allows the user to also see their own records when the policy is assignment, branch, or warehouse based.
form.isActiveHint: Inactive policies are ignored in resolution and assignment flows.

delete.confirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"?

wmsScopeAssignments.title: WMS Scope Assignments
wmsScopeAssignments.description: Manage which branch, warehouse, and record scope each user can operate on
wmsScopeAssignments.selectUserHint: Choose a user to edit scope assignments.
wmsScopeAssignments.editorDescription: You can define branch and warehouse based scope for multiple entity types.
wmsScopeAssignments.empty: This user does not have any WMS scope assignments yet.
wmsScopeAssignments.previewDescription: Shows the effective scope resolution for the selected entity type.
wmsScopeAssignments.previewEmpty: Choose a user and entity type to see the effective scope here.

unauthorized.title: Access Denied
unauthorized.description: You do not have permission to access this page. Contact your administrator if this appears to be incorrect.
